send_to_cs: No escalations for this client, send to CS using the Support templates
For post-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support template (shortcut: ESC)
➜ If the cx is having difficulties sending an email to CS via the link in the ESC temp - use Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
➜ If the cx is facing technical website issues while accessing the link, do NOT immediately send the TESC shortcut, troubleshoot first instead
For pre-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
tone: 🅿️ Use wording that is in line with the brand's voice and terminology found on the website
➜ e.g. Nova Kids, Nova Babes, Insta-worthy, slays, snatched, baddie, etc.
➜ Always look up the term's meaning before using it!
templates: For expired discounts use EXP shortcut
For login issues use LGI shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: If cx are looking for their 30% welcome code, ask to check their email (spam & promo)
Gift cards can be used on discounted items

Hey, I recently placed an order with you all and it has just been delayed. I really need that stuff for vacation. If possible, is there anything you all can do?
Template used: "Tracking Info - All brands"; last updated: 2023-10-10 16:47:28.277
Template used: "Cancel / edit order"; last updated: 2026-02-17 15:13:26.956
Template used: "Return policy / Warranty Policy"; last updated: 2024-09-27 14:18:46.872

Fashion Nova: Thank you for reaching out! I'm sorry to hear that you're experiencing this issue. I understand how frustrating that can be. Please note that the estimated delivery date is an estimate only and does not guarantee a specific timeframe, as couriers may occasionally experience unforeseen delays. 

If you're referring to Order #169364903, I see it was placed with standard shipping, which takes 3-7 business days for delivery from when it was placed, excluding weekends and holidays. That said, your order is still within the expected timeframe. Rest assured, we'll do our best to get it to you as soon as possible. 

You'll get a tracking email as soon as your order ships. If you don't see it in your inbox, be sure to check your spam and promo folders, sometimes our emails end up there as well.

I'm afraid once an order is placed we can't modify it. If you are unhappy with the purchase you may return it.

Visit http://sms.fashionnova.com/ag9bXgcnYWyL for the latest info. If you're not feeling your item(s), you have 30 days from delivery to return.

I hope this helps. Please let me know if you need further assistance. I'm happy to help.
